'''Max Simpson''' (born 24 July 2004) is a [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|ce}} for the [[Leeds Rhinos]] in the [[Super League]].

In 2022 he made professional debut for [[Leeds Rhinos|Leeds]] against the [[Castleford Tigers]].<ref>[https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/61141907 Castleford Tigers 16-14 Leeds Rhinos - Jack Sinfield handed Super League debut in defeat]</ref>
